creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Remaining bustage (found on 11.2 amd64):
- cad/freecad, https://www.freecadweb.org/tracker/view.php?id=3653
- devel/RStudio, https://github.com/rstudio/rstudio/issues/3760
- graphics/colmap, https://ptpb.pw/jr_C (haven't investigated)
- net-im/farstream, https://ptpb.pw/zwE4 (maybe unrelated)
- net-p2p/py-libtorrent-rasterbar, https://github.com/arvidn/libtorrent/issues/3378
- print/lyx, https://www.lyx.org/trac/ticket/11349
- science/rdkit, https://github.com/rdkit/rdkit/issues/2128
